title: Assessment Platform Migration — Image Mate to Schneider Geospatial Beacon
summary: CIO Vinnie Scipion presents item 30: migration of Image Mate Online to Beacon (Schneider Geospatial) for the Assessment Department. Platform was acquired and must align with Onondaga County's migration timeline. Implementation costs waived ($14K value), annual cost ~$8K. Commissioner Matt OJ (Assessment) notes the platform gets ~250,000 hits/year and is used by every municipality in Onondaga County. Councilor Caldwell asks about local vendor alternatives; Assessment confirms predecessor SDG was local and responsive. Council discusses broader philosophy of aligning with county platforms on a case-by-case basis.
